107 C0900B_RCALL_LCTN_ROOM_CD C0900B_RCALL_LCTN_ROOM_CD C0900B Staff Assessment of Mental Status - Recalls Location of Room Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indentifies whether or not the resident was able to recall the location of their room. -=Not assessed/no information
